docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWHAW, TITIANA
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF BROWHAW, TITIANA
REMARK:DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECD AT WINDOW & SUBMITTED
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE -RECD AFTER HEARING
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SHERIFF'FEE OF $40 WAIVED) SERVED MAY-09-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COINBASE, INC.
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY BROWHAW, TITIANA AS TO DEFENDANT COINBASE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-07-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF TITIANA BROWHAW IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT COINBASE IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE REPRESENTED BY JERRY NASCOTE, SENIOR ANALYIST LITIGATION SUPPORT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS ON FILE. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
